query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: OPEC+ approves further oil output increase as Strait of Hormuz exports recover
articles.description: OPEC+ has agreed a further increase in output targets from August, the group said in a statement on Sunday, adding to global supply at a time when oil prices are falling due to the gradual reopening of the Strait of Hormuz for oil exports.

articles.title: E20 debate explained: Mileage loss, engine concerns and what's next
articles.description: India News: NEW DELHI: For the second time in the past 11 months, country’s automobile majors have come to back govt’s mandatory 20% blending of ethanol in petrol.

articles.title: Fall in global crude prices brightens fiscal outlook, El Nino risks linger
articles.description: Easing West Asian tensions have significantly improved India's fiscal outlook, with economists now predicting a smaller deficit than previously feared. Lower global crude oil prices are reducing the government's subsidy burden and boosting revenue prospects. While subsidy pressures and potential agricultural impacts remain concerns, the improved energy price scenario offers a more favorable fiscal path for the nation.

articles.title: E20 shift must not leave drivers behind
articles.description: The government's rollout of E20 petrol, while extensively consulted, lacked clear communication to vehicle buyers, fueling misinformation. Despite ongoing trials and no apparent damage to vehicles, consumers remain largely uninformed. Policymakers must prioritize continuous, transparent communication to keep the public abreast of this crucial fuel-blending initiative, essential for India's energy security and climate goals.

articles.title: E20 petrol backlash grows: 53% of vehicle owners call rollout 'disastrous', 66% report mileage drop, survey finds
articles.description: India's E20 petrol rollout faces growing criticism as 53% of motorists rate it negatively and 66% report mileage losses, according to a LocalCircles survey.

articles.title: Union Petroleum Ministry Rejects Reports Of Bhutan Refusing India’s E20 Petrol
articles.description: MoPNG Clarifies No Export Offer Was Made; Dismisses Claims of Bhutan Rejecting Ethanol-Blended Fuel

articles.title: Top Three Catalysts That Could Move the S&P 500 and Dow This Week
articles.description: These are the top three catalysts that could move the S&P 500 and Dow Jones this week, including falling crude oil prices and key earnings.

articles.title: Oil prices hover near pre-conflict levels as OPEC+ boosts output again
articles.description: Oil prices remained near pre-conflict levels after OPEC+ approved another production increase, adding to global crude supplies as markets continue to stabilize.

articles.title: Centre Fact-Checks Claims Of Bhutan Rejecting India's E20 Fuel Offer: 'No Such Offer Made'
articles.description: The Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas clarified that reports claiming Bhutan rejected India's E20 petrol imports are false, as no such offer was made by Indian Oil Marketing Companies. , India News, Times Now

articles.title: Dalal Street Week Ahead: TCS Q1 earnings, FOMC minutes, oil prices, monsoon progress among 10 key factors to watch
articles.description: Going ahead, the market is expected to remain positive despite intermittent consolidation, with investors focusing on the FOMC minutes, June quarter earnings, oil prices, and the progress of the monsoon.
